ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policy_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the policy being updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Change of Policy) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_author" TEXT /* Author of the update */,
  "update_comment" TEXT /* Comment or justification for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_status" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Details regarding compliance measures and issues */,
  "compliance_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance report */,
  "compliance_report_author" TEXT /* Author of the compliance report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affected_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the affected population record */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the policy impacting the population */,
  "population_description" TEXT /* General description of the affected population */,
  "targeted_population" TEXT /* Specific targeted population (e.g., all residents, vulnerable groups) */,
  "population_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the population or subgroup */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the affected population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enforcement" (
  "enforcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enforcement record */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "enforcer" TEXT /* Entity responsible for enforcement */,
  "enforcement_details" TEXT /* Details on enforcement actions taken */,
  "enforcement_link" TEXT /* Link to more information about enforcement measures */,
  "enforcement_date" TEXT /* Date when enforcement actions were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enforcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "pdf_link" TEXT /* Link to PDF documents */,
  "link" TEXT /* External links related to the policy */,
  "collaboration" TEXT /* Collaborative entity involved */,
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* ID for collaboration tracking */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., policy brief, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target objectives */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the policy */,
  "target_geography" TEXT /* Target geographical level (e.g., national, provincial) */,
  "target_region" TEXT /* Target region specified for the policy */,
  "target_province" TEXT /* Target province if applicable */,
  "target_city" TEXT /* Target city if applicable */,
  "target_intl_org" TEXT /* International organizations involved */,
  "target_other" TEXT /* Other target entities or groups */,
  "target_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy impact */,
  "impact_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to measure policy impact (e.g., reduction in cases) */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Value of the impact measured by the metric */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effectiveness record */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated policy */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Score representing policy effectiveness (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "effectiveness_date" TEXT /* Date when the effectiveness was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate policy effectiveness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_log" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "record_id" TEXT /* Reference to the policy or feature accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "feature_accessed" TEXT /* Feature or policy accessed (e.g., policy details, updates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
